Class NamedSecretNormalizedSource

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.config.NormalizedSource
org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.config.NamedSecretNormalizedSource
public final class NamedSecretNormalizedSource extends NormalizedSource
A secret source that is based on name.
Author:
wind57

    • profileSpecificSources

      public boolean profileSpecificSources()

    • appendProfileToName

      public boolean appendProfileToName()
      append or not the active profiles to the name of the generated source. At the moment this is true only for config server generated sources.

    • prefix

      public ConfigUtils.Prefix prefix()

      Description copied from class: NormalizedSource
